notes: CRITICAL sync fix — the old Push/Pull wiring was fundamentally broken: Pull fetched remote JSON but never wrote anything to disk, and the startup auto-push could overwrite fresh cloud data with a stale desktop save. Completely rewritten: sync now stores the raw .fch bytes (base64) alongside the source mtime, and every direction is gated by 'whichever side is newer wins'. Replaced the two Push/Pull buttons with a single Sync button. Auto-sync on startup now reconciles both ways instead of blindly pushing. Also new: Discovered/Undiscovered toggle on the Valheim Data page when a character is loaded.
